data.title: Japan’s rate lift threatens Bitcoin as yen carry trades begin to unwind
data.description:

The Bank of Japan is expected to raise its benchmark rate to 0. 75% at the December policy meeting, the highest level since […]

data.title: Former DEA agent charged with crypto money laundering
data.description:
A former Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) agent has been charged with money laundering using digital assets. According to an indictment unsealed at a Federal Court in Manhattan, the agent, who agreed to oversee the DEA’s financial operations, was charged with agreeing to launder millions of dollars. The indictment noted that he first worked as a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/former-dea-agent-crypto-money-laundering/
